case_title: KEN LAM VS. EDUARDO CHABARRIA et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAM, KEN AS TO DEFENDANT CHABARRIA, EDUARDO EXECUPARK, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-06-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-08-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-22-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAM, KEN SERVED JUL-24-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHABARRIA, EDUARDO

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-23-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT EXECUPARK, INC. AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-06-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-23-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
